info_types.name: Service 9 Supported InfoTypes [01-20]
info_types.name_zh: 服务9支持的信息类型 [01-20]
info_types.description: Bit-encoded list of supported InfoTypes 01-20
info_types.description_zh: 支持的信息类型01-20的位编码列表

info_types.name: VIN Message Count
info_types.name_zh: VIN消息计数
info_types.description: Number of messages to report VIN. Always 05 for legacy protocols, not required for CAN.
info_types.description_zh: 报告VIN的消息数量。传统协议固定为05，CAN不需要。

info_types.name: Vehicle Identification Number (VIN)
info_types.name_zh: 车辆识别号 (VIN)
info_types.description: 17-character VIN. Default $3F if not programmed or unavailable.
info_types.description_zh: 17位ASCII字符的VIN码。未编程或不可用时使用$3F默认值。

info_types.name: Calibration ID Message Count
info_types.name_zh: 标定ID消息计数
info_types.description: Number of messages to report Calibration IDs. Always a multiple of 4 for legacy protocols.
info_types.description_zh: 报告标定ID的消息数量。传统协议固定为4的倍数。

info_types.name: Calibration ID (CALID)
info_types.name_zh: 标定ID (CALID)
info_types.description: 16-character ASCII calibration identification. Multiple CALIDs may be reported. Default $3F if unavailable.
info_types.description_zh: 16位ASCII字符标定标识。可报告多个CALID。不可用时使用$3F默认值。

info_types.name: CVN Message Count
info_types.name_zh: CVN消息计数
info_types.description: Number of messages to report Calibration Verification Numbers.
info_types.description_zh: 报告标定验证号的消息数量。

info_types.name: Calibration Verification Number (CVN)
info_types.name_zh: 标定验证号 (CVN)
info_types.description: 4-byte hex CVN used to verify software integrity. Default $00 if unavailable.
info_types.description_zh: 4字节十六进制CVN，用于验证软件完整性。不可用时默认$00。

info_types.name: IPT Message Count
info_types.name_zh: 在用性能跟踪消息计数
info_types.description: Number of messages to report In-use Performance Tracking. $08 for 16 values, $09 for 18, $0A for 20.
info_types.description_zh: 报告在用性能跟踪数据的消息数量。16个值=$08，18个=$09，20个=$0A。

info_types.name: In-use Performance Tracking (Spark Ignition)
info_types.name_zh: 在用性能跟踪 (点燃式发动机)
info_types.description: IPT counters for SI engines: OBDCOND, IGNCNTR, CAT, O2S, EGR/VVT, AIR, EVAP, SO2S, AFRI, PF. Supported lengths: 32 bytes (16 values), 40 bytes (20 values), or 56 bytes (28 values). Unimplemented counters reported as $0000.
info_types.description_zh: 点燃式发动机的IPT计数器：OBD监测条件、点火计数、催化器、氧传感器、EGR/VVT、二次空气、蒸发系统、后氧传感器、空燃比不平衡、颗粒过滤器。支持32/40/56字节。未实现的计数器报告$0000。

_sub_fields.label: OBDCOND
_sub_fields.name: OBD Monitoring Conditions Encountered Counts
_sub_fields.name_zh: OBD监测条件满足计数(通用分母)

_sub_fields.label: IGNCNTR
_sub_fields.name: Ignition Cycle Counter
_sub_fields.name_zh: 点火周期计数

_sub_fields.name: Catalyst Monitor Completion Counts Bank 1
_sub_fields.name_zh: 催化器监测完成计数 B1(分子)

_sub_fields.label: CATCOND1
_sub_fields.name: Catalyst Monitor Conditions Encountered Counts Bank 1
_sub_fields.name_zh: 催化器监测条件满足计数 B1(分母)

_sub_fields.label: CATCOMP2
_sub_fields.name: Catalyst Monitor Completion Counts Bank 2
_sub_fields.name_zh: 催化器监测完成计数 B2(分子)

_sub_fields.name: Catalyst Monitor Conditions Encountered Counts Bank 2
_sub_fields.name_zh: 催化器监测条件满足计数 B2(分母)

_sub_fields.label: O2SCOMP1
_sub_fields.name: O2 Sensor Monitor Completion Counts Bank 1
_sub_fields.name_zh: 氧传感器监测完成计数 B1(分子)

_sub_fields.label: O2SCOND1
_sub_fields.name: O2 Sensor Monitor Conditions Encountered Counts Bank 1
_sub_fields.name_zh: 氧传感器监测条件满足计数 B1(分母)

_sub_fields.label: O2SCOMP2
_sub_fields.name: O2 Sensor Monitor Completion Counts Bank 2
_sub_fields.name_zh: 氧传感器监测完成计数 B2(分子)

_sub_fields.label: O2SCOND2
_sub_fields.name: O2 Sensor Monitor Conditions Encountered Counts Bank 2
_sub_fields.name_zh: 氧传感器监测条件满足计数 B2(分母)

_sub_fields.label: EGRCOMP
_sub_fields.name: EGR/VVT Monitor Completion Condition Counts
_sub_fields.name_zh: EGR/VVT监测完成计数(分子)

_sub_fields.label: EGRCOND
_sub_fields.name: EGR/VVT Monitor Conditions Encountered Counts
_sub_fields.name_zh: EGR/VVT监测条件满足计数(分母)

_sub_fields.label: AIRCOMP
_sub_fields.name: AIR Monitor Completion Condition Counts
_sub_fields.name_zh: 二次空气监测完成计数(分子)

_sub_fields.label: AIRCOND
_sub_fields.name: AIR Monitor Conditions Encountered Counts
_sub_fields.name_zh: 二次空气监测条件满足计数(分母)

_sub_fields.label: EVAPCOMP
_sub_fields.name: EVAP Monitor Completion Condition Counts
_sub_fields.name_zh: 蒸发系统监测完成计数(分子)

_sub_fields.label: EVAPCOND
_sub_fields.name: EVAP Monitor Conditions Encountered Counts
_sub_fields.name_zh: 蒸发系统监测条件满足计数(分母)

_sub_fields.label: SO2SCOMP1
_sub_fields.name: Secondary O2 Sensor Monitor Completion Counts Bank 1
_sub_fields.name_zh: 后氧传感器监测完成计数 B1(分子)

_sub_fields.label: SO2SCOND1
_sub_fields.name: Secondary O2 Sensor Monitor Conditions Encountered Counts Bank 1
_sub_fields.name_zh: 后氧传感器监测条件满足计数 B1(分母)

_sub_fields.label: SO2SCOMP2
_sub_fields.name: Secondary O2 Sensor Monitor Completion Counts Bank 2
_sub_fields.name_zh: 后氧传感器监测完成计数 B2(分子)

_sub_fields.label: SO2SCOND2
_sub_fields.name: Secondary O2 Sensor Monitor Conditions Encountered Counts Bank 2
_sub_fields.name_zh: 后氧传感器监测条件满足计数 B2(分母)

_sub_fields.label: AFRICOMP1
_sub_fields.name: A/F Ratio Imbalance Monitor Completion Counts Bank 1
_sub_fields.name_zh: 空燃比不平衡监测完成计数 B1(分子)

_sub_fields.label: AFRICOND1
_sub_fields.name: A/F Ratio Imbalance Monitor Conditions Encountered Counts Bank 1
_sub_fields.name_zh: 空燃比不平衡监测条件满足计数 B1(分母)

_sub_fields.label: AFRICOMP2
_sub_fields.name: A/F Ratio Imbalance Monitor Completion Counts Bank 2
_sub_fields.name_zh: 空燃比不平衡监测完成计数 B2(分子)

_sub_fields.label: AFRICOND2
_sub_fields.name: A/F Ratio Imbalance Monitor Conditions Encountered Counts Bank 2
_sub_fields.name_zh: 空燃比不平衡监测条件满足计数 B2(分母)

_sub_fields.label: PFCOMP1
_sub_fields.name: Particulate Filter Monitor Completion Counts Bank 1
_sub_fields.name_zh: 颗粒过滤器监测完成计数 B1(分子)

_sub_fields.label: PFCOND1
_sub_fields.name: Particulate Filter Monitor Conditions Encountered Counts Bank 1
_sub_fields.name_zh: 颗粒过滤器监测条件满足计数 B1(分母)

_sub_fields.label: PFCOMP2
_sub_fields.name: Particulate Filter Monitor Completion Counts Bank 2
_sub_fields.name_zh: 颗粒过滤器监测完成计数 B2(分子)

_sub_fields.label: PFCOND2
_sub_fields.name: Particulate Filter Monitor Conditions Encountered Counts Bank 2
_sub_fields.name_zh: 颗粒过滤器监测条件满足计数 B2(分母)

info_types.name: ECU Name Message Count
info_types.name_zh: ECU名称消息计数
info_types.description: Number of messages to report ECU name. Always 5 for legacy protocols.
info_types.description_zh: 报告ECU名称的消息数量。传统协议固定为5。

info_types.name: ECU Name
info_types.name_zh: ECU名称
info_types.description: Max 20 ASCII chars: 4-char acronym + '-' delimiter + 15-char text name. Unused bytes $00.
info_types.description_zh: 最多20位ASCII字符：4位缩写 + '-'分隔符 + 15位文字名称。未使用字节填充$00。

info_types.name: In-use Performance Tracking (Compression Ignition)
info_types.name_zh: 在用性能跟踪 (压燃式发动机)
info_types.description: IPT counters for CI engines (2010 MY+): OBDCOND, IGNCNTR, NMHC CAT, NOx CAT, NOx Adsorber, PM Filter, EGS, EGR/VVT, Boost Pressure, Fuel System. 32 bytes (16 values) or 36 bytes (18 values). Unimplemented counters reported as $0000.
info_types.description_zh: 压燃式发动机(2010+)的IPT计数器：OBD监测条件、点火计数、NMHC催化器、NOx催化器、NOx吸附器、颗粒过滤器、排气传感器、EGR/VVT、增压控制、燃油系统。32或36字节。

_sub_fields.label: OBDCOND
_sub_fields.name: OBD Monitoring Conditions Encountered Counts
_sub_fields.name_zh: OBD监测条件满足计数(通用分母)

_sub_fields.label: IGNCNTR
_sub_fields.name: Ignition Cycle Counter
_sub_fields.name_zh: 点火周期计数

_sub_fields.label: HCCATCOMP
_sub_fields.name: NMHC Catalyst Monitor Completion Counts
_sub_fields.name_zh: NMHC催化器监测完成计数(分子)

_sub_fields.label: HCCATCOND
_sub_fields.name: NMHC Catalyst Monitor Conditions Encountered Counts
_sub_fields.name_zh: NMHC催化器监测条件满足计数(分母)

_sub_fields.label: NCATCOMP
_sub_fields.name: NOx/SCR Catalyst Monitor Completion Condition Counts
_sub_fields.name_zh: NOx/SCR催化器监测完成计数(分子)

_sub_fields.label: NCATCOND
_sub_fields.name: NOx/SCR Catalyst Monitor Conditions Encountered Counts
_sub_fields.name_zh: NOx/SCR催化器监测条件满足计数(分母)

_sub_fields.label: NADSCOMP
_sub_fields.name: NOx Adsorber Monitor Completion Condition Counts
_sub_fields.name_zh: NOx吸附器监测完成计数(分子)

_sub_fields.label: NADSCOND
_sub_fields.name: NOx Adsorber Monitor Conditions Encountered Counts
_sub_fields.name_zh: NOx吸附器监测条件满足计数(分母)

_sub_fields.label: PMCOMP
_sub_fields.name: PM Filter Monitor Completion Condition Counts
_sub_fields.name_zh: 颗粒过滤器监测完成计数(分子)

_sub_fields.label: PMCOND
_sub_fields.name: PM Filter Monitor Conditions Encountered Counts
_sub_fields.name_zh: 颗粒过滤器监测条件满足计数(分母)

_sub_fields.label: EGSCOMP
_sub_fields.name: Exhaust Gas Sensor Monitor Completion Counts
_sub_fields.name_zh: 排气传感器监测完成计数(分子)

_sub_fields.label: EGSCOND
_sub_fields.name: Exhaust Gas Sensor Monitor Conditions Encountered Counts
_sub_fields.name_zh: 排气传感器监测条件满足计数(分母)

_sub_fields.label: EGRCOMP
_sub_fields.name: EGR/VVT Monitor Completion Condition Counts
_sub_fields.name_zh: EGR/VVT监测完成计数(分子)

_sub_fields.label: EGRCOND
_sub_fields.name: EGR/VVT Monitor Conditions Encountered Counts
_sub_fields.name_zh: EGR/VVT监测条件满足计数(分母)

_sub_fields.label: BPCOMP
_sub_fields.name: Boost Pressure Monitor Completion Condition Counts
_sub_fields.name_zh: 增压控制监测完成计数(分子)

_sub_fields.label: BPCOND
_sub_fields.name: Boost Pressure Monitor Conditions Encountered Counts
_sub_fields.name_zh: 增压控制监测条件满足计数(分母)

_sub_fields.label: FUELCOMP
_sub_fields.name: Fuel Monitor Completion Condition Counts
_sub_fields.name_zh: 燃油系统监测完成计数(分子)

_sub_fields.label: FUELCOND
_sub_fields.name: Fuel Monitor Conditions Encountered Counts
_sub_fields.name_zh: 燃油系统监测条件满足计数(分母)

info_types.name: Engine Serial Number Message Count
info_types.name_zh: 发动机序列号消息计数
info_types.description: Number of messages to report ESN. Always 05 for legacy protocols.
info_types.description_zh: 报告发动机序列号的消息数量。传统协议固定为05。

info_types.name: Engine Serial Number (ESN)
info_types.name_zh: 发动机序列号 (ESN)
info_types.description: Up to 17 ASCII characters. Fill bytes $00 precede ESN characters.
info_types.description_zh: 最多17位ASCII字符。前导填充$00，后跟ESN字符。

info_types.name: EROTAN Message Count
info_types.name_zh: 排放法规/型式认证号消息计数
info_types.description: Number of messages to report Exhaust Regulation Or Type Approval Number.
info_types.description_zh: 报告排放法规或型式认证号的消息数量。

info_types.name: Exhaust Regulation Or Type Approval Number (EROTAN)
info_types.name_zh: 排放法规/型式认证号 (EROTAN)
info_types.description: Up to 17 ASCII characters. Only one EROTAN per ECU.
info_types.description_zh: 最多17位ASCII字符。每个ECU只报告一个EROTAN。

info_types.name: Protocol Identification
info_types.name_zh: 协议标识
info_types.description: 1 byte: 0x00=reserved, 0x01=ISO 27145-4, 0x02=SAE J1979 using ISO 27145-3 services, 0x03-0xFF=reserved.

info_types.name: WWH-OBD GTR Number
info_types.name_zh: WWH-OBD GTR编号
info_types.description: 11 ASCII characters: 'GTR_XXX.XXX' identifying GTR revision. Zeros are ASCII $30.
info_types.description_zh: 11位ASCII字符：'GTR_XXX.XXX'标识GTR修订版本。零为ASCII $30。

info_types.name: Fueled Engine Operation Ignition Cycle Counter
info_types.name_zh: 燃烧运行点火周期计数
info_types.description: 2-byte counter incremented when fueled engine operation occurs for at least 2 sec. Required for PHEVs, optional otherwise.
info_types.description_zh: 2字节计数器，在燃油发动机运行至少2秒时递增。PHEV必须支持，其他可选。

info_types.name: Certification Test Group / Engine Family Number
info_types.name_zh: 认证测试组/发动机系列号
info_types.description: 12 ASCII characters identifying the Test Group (light duty) or Engine Family Number (heavy duty). Default $3F if unavailable.
info_types.description_zh: 12位ASCII字符标识测试组(轻型车)或发动机系列号(重型车)。不可用时默认$3F。

info_types.name: Distance Traveled Since Evap Monitoring Decision
info_types.name_zh: 蒸发监测决策后行驶距离
info_types.description: 2-byte distance in km. Reset to $0000 on pass/fail decision. Reset to $FFFF on code clear. For 0.020" leak check certified vehicles.
info_types.description_zh: 2字节距离(km)。通过/失败决策时归零。清码时重置为$FFFF。适用于0.020"泄漏检测认证车辆。

info_types.name: Applicable Motorcycle Category for Type Approval
info_types.name_zh: 型式认证适用摩托车类别
info_types.description: 1 byte state encoded: 0x00=reserved, 0x01=L3e-A2 (medium), 0x02=L3e-A3 (high performance), 0x03-0xFF=reserved.
info_types.description_zh: 1字节状态编码：0x00=保留, 0x01=L3e-A2(中等性能), 0x02=L3e-A3(高性能), 0x03-0xFF=保留。

info_types.name: Vehicle Operation Data - Engine Run/Idle Time
info_types.name_zh: 车辆运行数据 - 发动机运行/怠速时间
info_types.description: 32 bytes: 8 x 4-byte counters (Recent+Lifetime for IGNCNTR, FEOCNTR, ERT, IERT). Each 1 second/bit, unsigned 32-bit.
info_types.description_zh: 32字节：8个4字节计数器（近期+终身的点火计数、燃烧运行计数、总运行时间、怠速时间）。每个1秒/位。

info_types.name: Vehicle Operation Data - Distance/Fuel Used
info_types.name_zh: 车辆运行数据 - 行驶距离/燃油消耗
info_types.description: 16 bytes: 4 x 4-byte counters (Recent+Lifetime for Distance 0.1km/bit, Fuel 0.01L/bit).
info_types.description_zh: 16字节：4个4字节计数器（近期+终身的行驶距离0.1km/位、燃油消耗0.01L/位）。

info_types.name: Vehicle Operation Data - PKE/EOE
info_types.name_zh: 车辆运行数据 - PKE/EOE
info_types.description: 12 bytes: PKE Recent/Lifetime (1 km/hr²/bit) + EOE Recent/Lifetime (0.1 kWh/bit). Note: PKE only has 2 counters (8 bytes) + EOE has 1 counter (4 bytes) for recent. Total actually 24 bytes (6 x 4-byte).
info_types.description_zh: 正动能(PKE)近期/终身(1 km/hr²/位) + 发动机输出能量(EOE)近期/终身(0.1 kWh/位)。

info_types.name: Vehicle Operation Data - PSA
info_types.name_zh: 车辆运行数据 - 驱动系统激活
info_types.description: 24 bytes: 6 x 4-byte counters (Recent+Lifetime for PSA total, PSA idle, PSA city). Each 1 sec/bit.
info_types.description_zh: 24字节：6个4字节计数器（近期+终身的总驱动时间、怠速驱动时间、城市驱动时间）。每个1秒/位。

info_types.name: Plug-in Hybrid Vehicle Distance Data
info_types.name_zh: 插电式混合动力车辆距离数据
info_types.description: 24 bytes: 6 x 4-byte counters (Recent+Lifetime for CD engine-off distance, CD engine-running distance, CI distance). 0.1 km/bit.
info_types.description_zh: 24字节：6个4字节计数器（近期+终身的电量消耗-发动机关闭距离、电量消耗-发动机运行距离、充电增加距离）。0.1 km/位。

info_types.name: Plug-in Hybrid Vehicle Fuel Data
info_types.name_zh: 插电式混合动力车辆燃油数据
info_types.description: 16 bytes: 4 x 4-byte counters (Recent+Lifetime for CD fuel consumed, CI fuel consumed). 0.01 L/bit.
info_types.description_zh: 16字节：4个4字节计数器（近期+终身的电量消耗模式燃油消耗、充电增加模式燃油消耗）。0.01 L/位。

info_types.name: Plug-in Hybrid Vehicle Grid Data
info_types.name_zh: 插电式混合动力车辆电网数据
info_types.description: 24 bytes: 6 x 4-byte counters (Recent+Lifetime for CD engine-off grid energy, CD engine-running grid energy, total grid energy into battery). 0.1 kWh/bit.
info_types.description_zh: 24字节：6个4字节计数器（近期+终身的发动机关闭电网能量、发动机运行电网能量、总电网充入能量）。0.1 kWh/位。

info_types.name: Active Aerodynamic Features #1 Off-cycle Credit Data
info_types.name_zh: 主动空气动力特性#1 非工况信用数据
info_types.description: 32 bytes: 8 x 4-byte timers (Recent+Lifetime for Grille Shutter A Timer1/2, Grille Shutter B Timer1/2). 1 sec/bit. 0xFFFFFFFF = Not Available.
info_types.description_zh: 32字节：8个4字节计时器（近期+终身的进气格栅A/B的Timer1/2）。1秒/位。0xFFFFFFFF=不可用。

info_types.name: Active Aerodynamic Features #2 Off-cycle Credit Data
info_types.name_zh: 主动空气动力特性#2 非工况信用数据
info_types.description: 16 bytes: 4 x 4-byte timers (Recent+Lifetime for Vehicle Ride Height Timer1/2). 1 sec/bit.
info_types.description_zh: 16字节：4个4字节计时器（近期+终身的车辆底盘高度Timer1/2）。1秒/位。

info_types.name: Active Aerodynamic Features #3 Off-cycle Credit Data
info_types.name_zh: 主动空气动力特性#3 非工况信用数据
info_types.description: 32 bytes: 8 x 4-byte timers (Recent+Lifetime for Aerodynamic Feature #1/#2 Timer1/2). 1 sec/bit.
info_types.description_zh: 32字节：8个4字节计时器（近期+终身的空气动力特性#1/#2的Timer1/2）。1秒/位。

info_types.name: Service 9 Supported InfoTypes [21-40]
info_types.name_zh: 服务9支持的信息类型 [21-40]
info_types.description: Bit-encoded list of supported InfoTypes 21-40
info_types.description_zh: 支持的信息类型21-40的位编码列表

info_types.name: Driver-Selectable Operating Modes Off-cycle Credit Data
info_types.name_zh: 驾驶员可选操作模式非工况信用数据
info_types.description: 40 bytes: 10 x 4-byte timers (Recent+Lifetime for Eco mode, DSM #1-#4). 1 sec/bit.
info_types.description_zh: 40字节：10个4字节计时器（近期+终身的Eco模式、可选模式#1–#4）。1秒/位。

info_types.name: Run Time for Stop-Start and Coasting Off-cycle Credit Data
info_types.name_zh: 启停/滑行非工况信用运行时间数据
info_types.description: 24 bytes: 6 x 4-byte timers (Recent+Lifetime for Idle Stop-Start, Engine Running Coasting, Engine Off Coasting). 1 sec/bit.
info_types.description_zh: 24字节：6个4字节计时器（近期+终身的怠速启停、发动机运行滑行、发动机关闭滑行）。1秒/位。

info_types.name: Driver Coaching Technology Off-cycle Credit Data
info_types.name_zh: 驾驶辅导技术非工况信用数据
info_types.description: 48 bytes: 12 x 4-byte counters (Recent+Lifetime for DCT#1/#2/#3 Enabled/Utilized). 1 count/bit.
info_types.description_zh: 48字节：12个4字节计数器（近期+终身的驾驶辅导技术#1/#2/#3启用/使用计数）。1计数/位。

info_types.name: Active Powertrain Warm-up Features Off-cycle Credit Data
info_types.name_zh: 主动动力系统暖机非工况信用数据
info_types.description: 16 bytes: 4 x 4-byte timers (Recent+Lifetime for Engine Warm-up, Transmission Warm-up). 1 sec/bit.
info_types.description_zh: 16字节：4个4字节计时器（近期+终身的发动机暖机、变速箱暖机）。1秒/位。

info_types.name: Off-cycle Credit Technology #1 Vehicle Data
info_types.name_zh: 非工况信用技术#1车辆数据
info_types.description: 16 bytes: 4 x 4-byte timers (Recent+Lifetime for OCCT#1 Timer1/2). 1 sec/bit. 0xFFFFFFFF = Timer 2 not used.
info_types.description_zh: 16字节：4个4字节计时器（近期+终身的OCCT#1 Timer1/2）。1秒/位。0xFFFFFFFF=Timer2未使用。

info_types.name: Off-cycle Credit Technology #2 Vehicle Data
info_types.name_zh: 非工况信用技术#2车辆数据
info_types.description: 16 bytes: 4 x 4-byte timers (Recent+Lifetime for OCCT#2 Timer1/2). 1 sec/bit.
info_types.description_zh: 16字节：4个4字节计时器（近期+终身的OCCT#2 Timer1/2）。1秒/位。

info_types.name_zh: 非工况信用技术#3车辆数据
info_types.description: 16 bytes: 4 x 4-byte timers (Recent+Lifetime for OCCT#3 Timer1/2). 1 sec/bit.
info_types.description_zh: 16字节：4个4字节计时器（近期+终身的OCCT#3 Timer1/2）。1秒/位。

info_types.description_zh: 16字节：4个4字节计时器（近期+终身的OCCT#4 Timer1/2）。1秒/位。
